title: Harden network defaults — loopback + optional token
description: Lock down 0.0.0.0:9000 — default to 127.0.0.1, opt-in env var (e.g. INFSB_BIND=0.0.0.0) for LAN exposure, optional shared-secret token for non-loopback control-plane requests. Also stop import-time side effects in inference_streaming_benchmark/logging.py — wrap in setup_logging() called explicitly from server.py and client.py. Document LAN-exposure semantics in README.

title: Document Ruff pre-commit requirement
description: Update AGENTS.md to state that Ruff must be run before every commit and push, because CI failed when it was skipped.
close_reason: Documented that agents must run uv run ruff check . before every commit and push.

title: Update README UI preview screenshot
description: Replace the README UI preview asset with the new root screenshot at full native resolution. Convert the PNG to JPG without cropping or resizing, keep the existing docs asset path, remove the untracked root screenshot, and commit with #none.
close_reason: Replaced README preview asset with the new full-resolution screenshot converted to JPG without cropping or resizing.

title: Add UI screenshot preview to README
description: Add the existing sweep and aggregation UI screenshot from the repo root to the README near the top. Move it into a suitable tracked docs/assets location, rename it descriptively, convert it from PNG to JPG, and update the README so users get a quick preview of what the project is about.
close_reason: Moved the root screenshot into docs/assets as a JPG and added a top-level README UI preview.

title: Consolidate transport default ports into env-driven config
description: README TODO migration: transport default_port constants are still defined per class. Move these defaults into the env-driven configuration module so port configuration has a single source of truth while preserving existing transport behavior.
close_reason: Centralized transport default ports in config with env overrides and updated transport registration/tests.

title: Improve dynamic batching configurability
description: README TODO migration: improve dynamic batching so batch sizes and waiting times can be configured more flexibly. Preserve current batching behavior by default and expose tunable settings consistently where batching is configured or reported.

title: Decide and apply package layout
description: Pick one of: (a) move client.py and server.py into the inference_streaming_benchmark package as CLI submodules, or (b) adopt src/ layout. Either way, drop pythonpath = ['.'] from pyproject.toml. Add [project.scripts] entries for infsb-server and infsb-client so users get console scripts. Loosen the upper bounds (<x.y+1) on dependencies in pyproject.toml — they currently ratchet too tight and will drift fast.

title: Tighten CI and quality gates
description: Add type checker (mypy or pyright) to CI; fix client.py:62 returning Optional[str] from a -> str signature. Add coverage report, pip-audit or Dependabot, a Docker build smoke job. Restrict workflow triggers (on: push: branches: [main] only — let pull_request handle PR runs) to avoid double-runs. Add Python 3.13 to the CI matrix. Beef up .pre-commit-config.yaml with end-of-file-fixer, trailing-whitespace, check-merge-conflict, check-yaml, check-added-large-files.

title: Harden Dockerfile
description: Add non-root USER, layered COPY (deps then source) for cache reuse, switch from pip install . to uv sync --frozen, add HEALTHCHECK against the control-plane /health endpoint, pin the base image to a sha256 digest. Verify image still builds and serves clients on a LAN.

title: Implement easy fixes from review
description: Lowest-risk items from the combined review: drop .flake8 + flake8 dep, remove playground.py, modernize license metadata, fix README Streamlit reference, pin GHA SHA, extend .dockerignore, add MANIFEST.in if uv build verifies. Skips loopback default, logging refactor, Dockerfile rewrite — those touch runtime/Docker behavior.

title: Document branch and PR conventions in AGENTS.md
description: Add a brief Branch & PR Conventions section to AGENTS.md covering GitHub Flow + plain imperative commits + branch naming + PR title/description rules. Sits between Commit Tags and Non-Interactive Shell Commands sections.

title: Expand AGENTS.md with more guidelines
description: AGENTS.md currently only covers non-interactive shell commands and the beads quick reference. Add more concrete guidance for AI agents working on this repo (e.g. transport plug-in pattern, lazy-import rules for torch/ultralytics, test conventions with fakes instead of real model loads, when to add a new transport vs. extend an existing one, ruff/format expectations before commit).

title: Document agent PR-creation workflow in AGENTS.md
description: Add an instruction to the Branch & PR Conventions section that the agent must always draft the PR title + body in the prescribed format and open the PR via gh pr create. Demonstrates the new workflow on its own PR.

title: Populate package __init__ with __version__
description: Populate inference_streaming_benchmark/__init__.py with __version__ derived from importlib.metadata.version('inference-streaming-benchmark'), so library users can read the package version programmatically. Small isolated change but worth its own commit.

title: Code nits — engine readability and port logging
description: engine.py:117 — chained self._get_or_load_model()(payload, ...) is hard to read; split into a temporary or rename. Verify Server.switch (server.py:78) logs cls.default_port consistently with env-overridable config.TRANSPORT_DEFAULT_PORTS so log output reflects the actual bound port, not the class default.

title: Add CONTRIBUTING / CHANGELOG / SECURITY and trim oversized assets
description: Add CONTRIBUTING.md (link to AGENTS.md conventions), CHANGELOG.md (Keep a Changelog format, or auto-generated once release-please lands), SECURITY.md (disclosure address). Compress or lazy-fetch resources/example_dall_e.png — currently 4.4 MB committed and pulled into every clone.

title: Migrate to Conventional Commits + release-please
description: Replace the #minor / #major / #none commit-message DSL with Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, etc.) and adopt release-please (or semantic-release) for automatic version bumps and CHANGELOG.md generation. Update AGENTS.md Branch & PR Conventions section to match. Decision required from user before starting — see review item 12.
